title: Prepare Q3 Project Presentation
description: Create slides for the quarterly review meeting including timeline, key metrics, and roadmap.
notes: Ensure that the financial data slides are reviewed by the finance team before showing them to the board members. Focus heavily on growth metrics and customer retention rates.

title: Schedule Annual Health Checkup
description: Call the clinic and book a slot for the comprehensive health checkup.

subtasks.title: Find blood work records from last year

notes: Dr. Sarah's clinic. Preferred times: morning slots on Wednesday or Thursday.

title: Buy Anniversary Gift & Cards
description: Find a thoughtful gift for the upcoming 5th wedding anniversary.
notes: Look at the local jewelry shops or book online. Make sure it gets delivered by Friday at the latest!

title: Restock Office Supplies
description: Purchase printer paper, sticky notes, and whiteboard markers.
notes: Office expenses card must be used for payment. Receipt submitted to HR.
